title: SDS-PAGE
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"175at","text":"NuPAGE Sample Buffer 4X Concentrate (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2gr5a","text":"Heating block","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8cdsb","text":"XCell SureLockTM Mini-Cell (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":6,"length":8},{"style":"sup","offset":14,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7u742","text":"4-12% Bis-Tris gels (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1bstn","text":"NuPAGE MES SDS Running Buffer (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6bh49","text":"SeeBlue Plus2 Pre-stained Protein Standard (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"929i4","text":"Instant Blue Protein stain (Abcam)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"csoji","text":"ChemiDoc MP Imaging system (Bio-Rad)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dilute NuPAGE Sample Buffer 4X Concentrate into protein samples
Run gel at ~150 V for 35 min
Incubate in staining solution until bands appear
Image using ChemiDoc MP Imaging system
creator: Alexander Röntgen
